languages.text: Герой Человечества, возлюбленный сын Императора, также почитаемый, как "Великий Ангел". Один из самых благородных и могущественных примархов, чьи харизма, смирение и преданность навеки вписали его в историю Галактики.

Hero of Humanity and the Emperor's beloved son, revered also as the Great Angel, Sanguinius was among the most honourable and mightiest Primarchs, whose leadership, humility, and loyalty forever etched his name in the annals of the galaxy.
languages.original_text: Герой Человечества, возлюбленный сын Императора, также почитаемый, как "Великий Ангел". Один из самых благородных и могущественных примархов, чьи харизма, смирение и преданность навеки вписали его в историю Галактики.

Hero of Humanity and the Emperor's beloved son, revered also as the Great Angel, Sanguinius was among the most honourable and mightiest Primarchs, whose leadership, humility, and loyalty forever etched his name in the annals of the galaxy.

languages.text: 人類の英雄であり、皇帝の愛する息子、また大天使として崇められたサンギニウスは、最も名誉あるプライマルクであり、そのリーダーシップ、謙虚さ、忠誠心は、彼の名を銀河の歴史に刻み込んだ。
languages.original_text: Hero of Humanity and the Emperor's beloved son, revered also as the Great Angel, Sanguinius was among the most honourable and mightiest Primarchs, whose leadership, humility, and loyalty forever etched his name in the annals of the galaxy.

traits.locale_text: 人類の英雄であり、皇帝の愛する息子、また大天使として崇められたサンギニウスは、最も名誉あるプライマルクであり、そのリーダーシップ、謙虚さ、忠誠心は、彼の名を銀河の歴史に刻み込んだ。

languages.text: 人类的英雄，帝皇的爱子，亦被尊为伟大天使的圣吉列斯，是最为荣耀、最为强大的基因原体之一。他的统率之才、谦逊之心与忠诚之志，将他的名字永远铭刻于银河的史册之上。
languages.original_text: Hero of Humanity and the Emperor's beloved son, revered also as the Great Angel, Sanguinius was among the most honourable and mightiest Primarchs, whose leadership, humility, and loyalty forever etched his name in the annals of the galaxy.

traits.locale_text: 人类的英雄，帝皇的爱子，亦被尊为伟大天使的圣吉列斯，是最为荣耀、最为强大的基因原体之一。他的统率之才、谦逊之心与忠诚之志，将他的名字永远铭刻于银河的史册之上。

languages.text: İnsanlığın kahramanı ve İmparator'un sevgili oğlu olan, aynı zamanda da Ulu Melek sıfatıyla büyük hürmet gören Sanguinius; gelmiş geçmiş en şerefli ve kudretli Primarklar arasında yer almaktadır. Sergilediği önderlik, alçak gönüllülük ve sadakat; adını galaksinin yıllıklarına altın harflerle kazımıştır.
languages.original_text: Hero of Humanity and the Emperor's beloved son, revered also as the Great Angel, Sanguinius was among the most honourable and mightiest Primarchs, whose leadership, humility, and loyalty forever etched his name in the annals of the galaxy.

traits.locale_text: İnsanlığın kahramanı ve İmparator'un sevgili oğlu olan, aynı zamanda da Ulu Melek sıfatıyla büyük hürmet gören Sanguinius; gelmiş geçmiş en şerefli ve kudretli Primarklar arasında yer almaktadır. Sergilediği önderlik, alçak gönüllülük ve sadakat; adını galaksinin yıllıklarına altın harflerle kazımıştır.

languages.text: Un héroe de la Humanidad e hijo amado del Emperador. El Gran Ángel, Sanguinius, era uno de los primarcas más poderosos y honorables y su liderazgo, humildad y lealtad grabaron su nombre permanentemente en los anales de la galaxia.
languages.original_text: Hero of Humanity and the Emperor's beloved son, revered also as the Great Angel, Sanguinius was among the most honourable and mightiest Primarchs, whose leadership, humility, and loyalty forever etched his name in the annals of the galaxy.

traits.locale_text: Un héroe de la Humanidad e hijo amado del Emperador. El Gran Ángel, Sanguinius, era uno de los primarcas más poderosos y honorables y su liderazgo, humildad y lealtad grabaron su nombre permanentemente en los anales de la galaxia.

languages.text: Héros de l'humanité et fils bien-aimé de l'Empereur, également connu sous le nom de « Grand Ange », Sanguinius faisait partie des primarques les plus honorables et puissants. De par son charisme, son humilité et sa loyauté, il a mérité que son nom soit inscrit à jamais dans les annales de la galaxie.
languages.original_text: Hero of Humanity and the Emperor's beloved son, revered also as the Great Angel, Sanguinius was among the most honourable and mightiest Primarchs, whose leadership, humility, and loyalty forever etched his name in the annals of the galaxy.

traits.locale_text: Héros de l'humanité et fils bien-aimé de l'Empereur, également connu sous le nom de « Grand Ange », Sanguinius faisait partie des primarques les plus honorables et puissants. De par son charisme, son humilité et sa loyauté, il a mérité que son nom soit inscrit à jamais dans les annales de la galaxie.

languages.text: Held der Menschheit und geliebter Sohn des Imperators. Der auch als Großer Engel verehrte Sanguinius war einer der ehrenhaftesten und mächtigsten Patriarchen, dessen Führerschaft, Demut und Loyalität in den Annalen der Galaxie unvergessen ist.
languages.original_text: Hero of Humanity and the Emperor's beloved son, revered also as the Great Angel, Sanguinius was among the most honourable and mightiest Primarchs, whose leadership, humility, and loyalty forever etched his name in the annals of the galaxy.

traits.locale_text: Held der Menschheit und geliebter Sohn des Imperators. Der auch als Großer Engel verehrte Sanguinius war einer der ehrenhaftesten und mächtigsten Patriarchen, dessen Führerschaft, Demut und Loyalität in den Annalen der Galaxie unvergessen ist.
